error_signature: %error-blkloopinit: <file>:<n>: unsupported: delayed assignment to array inside for loops (non-delayed is ok - see docs) <n> | for (i = <n>; i < <n>; i = i + <n>) s[i] <= '<n>; | ^ ... for error description see https://verilator.org/warn/blkloopinit?v=<n>.<n> %error: exiting due to <n> error(s) ... see the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance
raw_error_example:
%Error-BLKLOOPINIT: output/transposed_64.sv:114:45: Unsupported: Delayed assignment to array inside for loops (non-delayed is ok - see docs)
  114 |             for (i = 0; i < 65; i = i + 1) s[i] <= '0;
      |                                             ^
                    ... For error description see https://verilator.org/warn/BLKLOOPINIT?v=5.020
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
root_cause: Verilator does not support non-blocking assignments (<=) to array elements inside for loops.
fix_rule: Use blocking assignments (=) when initializing arrays inside loops, or unroll the loop manually.
